name: Peanut Butter White Chocolate Candy Dreams
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small glass bowl or dish, heat peanut butter in the microwave on High for 30-40 seconds to soften.
2. Mix in powdered sugar and cream; the mixture should be stiff, not runny.
3. In a medium glass bowl, melt white chocolate in the microwave on Medium for 1-1/2 to 2-1/2 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking time or until melted and smooth.
4. Stir in chopped almonds.
5. Spoon a little white chocolate mixture into the bottom of each of 18 paper candy cups (2 inches in diameter).
6. Swirl with the back of a teaspoon to make an even layer.
7. Drop a little peanut butter mixture on top of the white chocolate in each cup and spread around with the back of a spoon to make an even layer.
8. Spoon remaining white chocolate over the peanut butter, using the back of a spoon to swirl evenly.
9. Top each cup with a whole almond.
10. Refrigerate until firm. Store candies in the refrigerator for up to a week.
